heroHeadline: US Blockades Iranian Ports as Pakistan Proposes New Diplomatic Talks
heroSubtitle: Iran's naval forces formally commenced the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on April 14, cutting off approximately 20% of global oil supply. Hezbollah simultaneously pressured Lebanon to abandon normalization talks with Israel, deepening the regional crisis following the collapse of Islamabad peace negotiations.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-14. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal, The Independent, Jerusalem Post.
